tx_commercial_biometric_privacy.description: Commercial biometric identifier capture in Texas

obligations.content: Inform the individual before capturing the biometric identifier.
Obtain freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous consent through a clear affirmative act before capture.
Consent cannot be based only on broad terms of use.
Consent obtained through dark patterns is invalid.

notes: Biometric identifier means retina scan, iris scan, fingerprint, voiceprint, or a record of hand or face geometry.
This check is independent from the Texas AI deployment, Chapter 552 disclosure, and practitioner diagnostic-use checks.
